sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27362" key="diplasiepitetramerh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διπλᾰσι-επιτετραμερής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23</biblScope></bibl>, and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διπλᾰσι-επιτετράπεμπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, ibid., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope> </bibl> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope> </bibl>/<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope> </bibl> <sense id="n27362.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">times as great:</tr_> </sense> </entryFree>
